ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Alisa Kim, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)
